user_prompt: Bless the carapace armour for purification
prayer:
Approach the carapace armour with solemn reverence and intone the Litany of Purification.
Scour its adamantium plates thrice with sanctified abrasives to banish impure residues.
Anoint the inner struts of the carapace armour with sacred oils, beseeching its Machine Spirits to purity.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the carapace armour, sealing the rite of purification with electro-incantations.
Verify sanctity through auspex harmonics, proclaiming the armour reborn in machine purity.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for cortex controller a calibration?
prayer:
Present the cortex controller before the altar of calibration and whisper the Awakening Doxology.
Align its neural pathways with precision mechadendrites, initiating the sacred calibration sequence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the cortex controller to harmonize its synaptic coils.
Chant binary psalms over the cortex controller whilst adjusting voltaic thresholds to Omnissiah's exactitude.
Affirm calibration completion via diagnostic noosphere probes, exalting the controller's renewed precision.

Kneel before the mighty Baneblade and commence the Grand Consecration with thunderous hymnals.
Anoint its vast treads and hull with blessed machine oil, invoking consecration upon every rivet.
Awaken the colossal Machine Spirits within the Baneblade through resonant binaric canticles.
Circumambulate the Baneblade, asperging its battlements whilst proclaiming the Omnissiah's dominion.
Seal the consecration with a plasma-flame sigil, affirming the Baneblade's holy armament.

user_prompt: My serberys raider is ready for synchronization
prayer:
Position the serberys raider upon the synchronization dais and recite the Syncronicity Benediction.
Interface mechadendrites with its cybernetic mounts, commencing the synchronization ritual.
Coax the Machine Spirits of the serberys raider into phased unity with noospheric chants.
Modulate its feral drives during synchronization, harmonizing beast and machine in Omnissiah's will.
Test the serberys raider's bond through auspex trials, glorifying its synchronized ferocity.

user_prompt: My life signs monitor is ready for repair
prayer:
Lay hands upon the life signs monitor and invoke the Rite of Repair with measured incantations.
Diagnose fractured circuits within the life signs monitor, excising damaged nodes with sacred tools.
Reweave its bio-scry filaments, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the life signs monitor to mend.
Anoint repaired pathways with conductive balms, channeling Omnissiah's restorative essence.
Validate the life signs monitor's revival via test pulses, hailing its vigilant rebirth.

prayer:

Awaken the predatory Machine Spirits of the pteraxii sterylizor through screeching binaric shrieks.
Initiate core ignition whilst circumscribing the pteraxii sterylizor with purity wards.
Ascertain startup integrity by noospheric communion, praising the Omnissiah's lethal grace.

Elevate the electoo to the sterilization pyre and chant the Sterilization Absolution.
Purge its dermal circuits with sanctified rad-scourge, enacting the sterilization upon the electoo.
Beseech the embedded Machine Spirits of the electoo to endure the cleansing flames.
Re-anoint the electoo's filaments post-sterilization with purity unguents.
Confirm sterility through auspex purity scans, invoking the Omnissiah's untainted spark.

Approach the plasma obliterator with awe and begin the Preparation Liturgy in plasma-lit gloom.
Calibrate its containment coils for preparation, whispering binding oaths to its volatile heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the plasma obliterator to stabilize thermic fury.
Bless flux-vents with sacred coolants during preparation, honoring the Omnissiah's wrath.
Finalize readiness with test-arcing, sanctifying the plasma obliterator's cataclysmic potential.

Commence flight diagnostics, affirming the Valkyrie gunship's aerial dominion.

user_prompt: Can you guide amplivisor a shutdown?
prayer:

Decelerate its optic processors sequentially, guiding the amplivisor into dormant repose.
Pacify the vigilant Machine Spirits of the amplivisor with lulling binaric vespers.
Sever power conduits whilst invoking Omnissiah's protective shroud upon the amplivisor.
Seal the shutdown with auspex-veiled wards, ensuring the amplivisor's quiescent vigil.
